data.body: CHECKPOINT COMPLETE: Fixed 2 calls in tests/hooks/test-merge-state.sh. test_is_merge_in_progress_detects_merge_head (line 236) and test_is_merge_in_progress_returns_false_when_no_merge (line 252) both wrapped with (cd "$merge_repo" ...) and (cd "$clean_repo" ...) subshells respectively. All 15 tests pass (30 assertions). Golden-path tests (57 assertions) unaffected.
